creator: michiel@vanbaak.eu
text:
(In reply to Nuno Teixeira from comment #2)

Yeah sure, sorry for the noise. Had a ton of tickets open (both OS and work) what were taking longer then normally, and I blindly bumped them all.

my main question is: please dont forget this one.
Some other *arr updates I sent in were picked up by you BLAZINGLY fast (thanks a lot for that! pleasant surprise) and this one is lingering a bit so wanted to ask for someone to have a look at it, but in the big batch I made a shitty comment on it.
Sorry again.
